{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Hotel Sunshine is an impressive 7th floor architectural landmark overlooking the scenic view of the Enugu metropolis A luxurious four star hotel that caters to business and leisure travelers with facilities of international standard. From the reception hall to the sky-bar, the d&eacute;cor is stylish and understated in line with international trends.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location:&nbsp;Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking a highly skilled, detail-oriented, and trustworthy Accountant to join our team and support our financial operations.


Job Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, reports, and statements.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes.
	Monitor daily financial transactions and reconcile accounts.
	Assist in budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning.
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations, tax requirements, and internal policies.
	Prepare payroll and support audit processes.
	Provide financial insights to support management decision-making.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	2&ndash;4 yearsex of perience, preferably in hospitality or a similar industry.
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.
	High level of integrity and confidentiality.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application letter to:&nbsp;hr@hotelsunshineng.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Accountant Job at Hotel Sunshine




        
    

        
        Hotel Sunshine is an impressive 7th floor architectural landmark overlooking the scenic view of the Enugu metropolis A luxurious four star hotel that caters to business and leisure travelers with facilities of international standard. From the reception hall to the sky-bar, the décor is stylish and understated in line with international trends.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Enugu
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a highly skilled, detail-oriented, and trustworthy Accountant to join our team and support our financial operations.


Job Responsibilities


	Prepare and maintain accurate financial records, reports, and statements.
	Manage accounts payable and receivable processes.
	Monitor daily financial transactions and reconcile accounts.
	Assist in budgeting, forecasting, and financial planning.
	Ensure compliance with financial regulations, tax requirements, and internal policies.
	Prepare payroll and support audit processes.
	Provide financial insights to support management decision-making.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field.
	2–4 yearsex of perience, preferably in hospitality or a similar industry.
	Professional certification (e.g., ICAN, ACCA) is an added advantage.
	Proficiency in accounting software and Microsoft Excel.
	Strong analytical skills and attention to detail.
	High level of integrity and confidentiality.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Application letter to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head of Sales & Marketing",
  "description": "Nairametrics is Nigeria&rsquo;s leading business and financial media platform providing timely news, expert analysis, data, and insights on financial markets, the economy, and business trends.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Sales &amp; Marketing

Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role


	We are looking to hire a Head of Sales &amp; Marketing to lead and drive the company&rsquo;s revenue growth. This role combines both strategy and execution and is suited for someone who is comfortable building relationships, closing deals, and improvinghow the company positions andsellsits services.
	The ideal candidate will take ownership of sales performance while also overseeing marketing efforts that support client acquisition and brand visibility.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive revenue growth across Nairametrics&rsquo; commercial offerings including sponsored content, corporate partnerships, events, and reports.
	Identifyand engage potential clients, pitch the company&rsquo;s products, and convert opportunities into long-term business relationships.
	Manage and grow relationships with existing clients to encourage repeat business and upsell opportunities.
	Oversee marketing activities across digital channels, campaigns, and events to attract and retainclients.
	Work with internal teams to ensure products and offerings are clearly positioned and meet market needs.
	Lead and support the sales team by setting targets, tracking performance, and ensuring consistent delivery on revenue goals.


Requirements


	5&ndash;7 years of experience in sales, marketing, or commercial roles.
	Proven ability to generate revenue, close deals, and manage client relationships.
	Experience in media, fintech, financial services, or a related industry is an advantage.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
	Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with both strategic and hands-on responsibilities.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;hello.hr@nairametrics.com&nbsp;using &ldquo;Head of Sales &amp; Marketing&rdquo; as the subject of the email.",

Head of Sales & Marketing Job at Nairametrics




        
    

        
        Nairametrics is Nigeria’s leading business and financial media platform providing timely news, expert analysis, data, and insights on financial markets, the economy, and business trends.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head of Sales & Marketing

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

About the Role
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking to hire a Head of Sales & Marketing to lead and drive the company’s revenue growth. This role combines both strategy and execution and is suited for someone who is comfortable building relationships, closing deals, and improvinghow the company positions andsellsits services.
	The ideal candidate will take ownership of sales performance while also overseeing marketing efforts that support client acquisition and brand visibility.


Key Responsibilities


	Drive revenue growth across Nairametrics’ commercial offerings including sponsored content, corporate partnerships, events, and reports.
	Identifyand engage potential clients, pitch the company’s products, and convert opportunities into long-term business relationships.
	Manage and grow relationships with existing clients to encourage repeat business and upsell opportunities.
	Oversee marketing activities across digital channels, campaigns, and events to attract and retainclients.
	Work with internal teams to ensure products and offerings are clearly positioned and meet market needs.
	Lead and support the sales team by setting targets, tracking performance, and ensuring consistent delivery on revenue goals.


Requirements


	5–7 years of experience in sales, marketing, or commercial roles.
	Proven ability to generate revenue, close deals, and manage client relationships.
	Experience in media, fintech, financial services, or a related industry is an advantage.
	Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship management skills.
	Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment with both strategic and hands-on responsibilities.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using “Head of Sales & Marketing” as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo

	Must be able to handle video and photo cameras professionally
	Must be skilled in video editing using modern editing software
	Must have experience in live streaming (OBS, VMIX is an advantage)
	Ability to cover events and travel when required
	Must reside within Ibadan (Jericho axis preferred)

	Applicants must reside in Jericho, Mokola ,Eleyele, Sango, Ologunru, Ajibode, UI-Agbowo axis, Ibadan.

N100,000 - N150,000 / Month.

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;info@ceoafrica.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Graphic Designer Job at CEOAFRICA




        
    

        
        CEOAFRICA is a leading online media organization, Apart from reporting news objectively, we are also into production of world class documentaries, media consultations and partnerships, media coverage of seminars, workshops, training, conferences, production of jingles & promos, digital ads, magazine production, web designs, red carpet event, including photo and video production. Our vision is to bring Africa to the world and the world to Africa with the African Union Agenda 2063 of the Africa we want.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphic Designer

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Must be able to handle video and photo cameras professionally
	Must be skilled in video editing using modern editing software
	Must have experience in live streaming (OBS, VMIX is an advantage)
	Ability to cover events and travel when required
	Must reside within Ibadan (Jericho axis preferred)


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a relevant qualification
	Applicants must reside in Jericho, Mokola ,Eleyele, Sango, Ologunru, Ajibode, UI-Agbowo axis, Ibadan.


Salary
N100,000 - N150,000 / Month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "UI / UX Designer",
  "description": "Zeedlabs is a Pan-African company that offers comprehensive IT services across various domains, including communication and integration, infrastructure, managed support, cloud computing, and software solutions. They specialize in providing systems solutions tailored to meet diverse technological needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI / UX Designer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ilorin, Kwara
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview


	We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to design intuitive, and user-friendly digital experiences.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for translating user needs and business requirements into functional and visually appealing designs across web and mobile platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	UI/UX Design.
	Design web &amp; mobile interfaces.
	Create wireframes, prototypes &amp; high-fidelity designs.
	Conduct user research &amp; usability testing.
	Maintain design systems &amp; collaborate with developers.
	Project Coordination.
	Track project timelines &amp; deliverables.
	Facilitate communication across teams.
	Document requirements &amp; workflows.


Requirements


	2&ndash;4 years of UI / UX experience.
	Strong portfolio (web / mobile projects).
	Proficiency in Figma.
	Familiarity with Agile workflows.
	Strong communication &amp; organizational skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio to:&nbsp;career@zeedlabs.com&nbsp;using th e Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.",

UI / UX Designer Job at Zeedlabs




        
    

        
        Zeedlabs is a Pan-African company that offers comprehensive IT services across various domains, including communication and integration, infrastructure, managed support, cloud computing, and software solutions. They specialize in providing systems solutions tailored to meet diverse technological needs.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: UI / UX Designer

Job Location: Ilorin, Kwara
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented UI/UX Designer to design intuitive, and user-friendly digital experiences.
	The ideal candidate will be responsible for translating user needs and business requirements into functional and visually appealing designs across web and mobile platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	UI/UX Design.
	Design web & mobile interfaces.
	Create wireframes, prototypes & high-fidelity designs.
	Conduct user research & usability testing.
	Maintain design systems & collaborate with developers.
	Project Coordination.
	Track project timelines & deliverables.
	Facilitate communication across teams.
	Document requirements & workflows.


Requirements


	2–4 years of UI / UX experience.
	Strong portfolio (web / mobile projects).
	Proficiency in Figma.
	Familiarity with Agile workflows.
	Strong communication & organizational skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and Portfolio to: [email protected] using th e Job Posiiton as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

  "description": "O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise, based in Lagos, Nigeria, is a registered business specializing in thesales, supply, and distribution of general goods, general merchandise, and general contracting services. Registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC), the enterprise operates in areas such as manufacturing, warehousing, and sales executive roles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operating Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Promptly answer the questions of staff and other stakeholders.
	Provide excellent customer service and maintain relationships with vendors.
	Prepare and file forms and other documents.
	Assist with recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Take inventory and order office supplies as needed.
	Update logs and order forms.
	Analyze all operations and forward suggestions for improvement to the Manager.


Requirements and skills


	Proven work experience as an Operations Assistant or similar role.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Superb organizational abilities.
	Outstanding interpersonal skills.
	Relevant training and/or certifications as an Operations Assistant.


Salary
N85,000 - N150,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hropeeniceglobent@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Operating Assistant Job at O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise




        
    

        
        O.Peenice Adio Global Enterprise, based in Lagos, Nigeria, is a registered business specializing in thesales, supply, and distribution of general goods, general merchandise, and general contracting services. Registered with the Corporate Affairs Commission (CAC), the enterprise operates in areas such as manufacturing, warehousing, and sales executive roles.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Operating Assistant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Promptly answer the questions of staff and other stakeholders.
	Provide excellent customer service and maintain relationships with vendors.
	Prepare and file forms and other documents.
	Assist with recruitment and onboarding processes.
	Take inventory and order office supplies as needed.
	Update logs and order forms.
	Analyze all operations and forward suggestions for improvement to the Manager.


Requirements and skills


	Proven work experience as an Operations Assistant or similar role.
	Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
	Superb organizational abilities.
	Outstanding interpersonal skills.
	Relevant training and/or certifications as an Operations Assistant.


Salary
N85,000 - N150,000 per month. 

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
